title: Boat Rental in Belize Ambergris: Budget Tips for 2026
html:
Exploring Belize Ambergris by boat does not need to break the bank. Shared day charters from San Pedro town start at around €80 per person, while self-drive motorboats begin at €180 for a half-day. BoatHire24 connects you with verified local operators offering affordable options.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Belize Ambergris?

Prices vary from €80 for a shared tour to €1,200 for a full-day crewed yacht. Budget-conscious travellers can book a half-day small motorboat from €180, while a full-day catamaran for up to ten guests costs around €750. For a premium experience, check the Princess F70 charter page on BoatHire24 for rates and availability. You can day charters in Belize Ambergris for your chosen dates.

Where to set off in Belize Ambergris

Most boat rentals depart from San Pedro, the island's main town. Key points include the Belize Yacht Club, located at the southern end of San Pedro. The nearby public pier at the San Pedro Municipal Airstrip is a popular launch for water taxis and small charters. North of town, the Grand Belizean Marina offers full-service facilities. For trips to the reef, Secret Beach on the west coast provides calm waters closer to the barrier reef. Further south, the village of Caye Caulker is a common stop on multi-island excursions. One option worth a look is the Princess F70 charter page.

Which boat to rent

  1. Small motorboat (16, 20 ft), ideal for couples or small groups exploring the reef; capacity 4 guests; from €180 for a half-day.
  2. Pontoon boat, perfect for family outings to Secret Beach; capacity 8 guests; from €250 for a half-day.
  3. Sailing catamaran, spacious for a day trip to Caye Caulker; capacity 10 guests; from €750 for a full day.
  4. Crewed motor yacht (e.g., Princess F70), luxury cruise with captain and crew; capacity 6 guests; from €1,200 for a full day.

Cost breakdown for Belize Ambergris boat rentals

  • Shared snorkelling tour to Hol Chan Marine Reserve: €80 per person, typically 3, 4 hours.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): from €180 for the boat, fuel included.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours) for up to ten guests: from €750, including lunch and drinks.
  • Crewed yacht full-day (8 hours) for six guests: from €1,200, with captain and crew.

When to visit and what about licences?

The best months for boating in Belize Ambergris are November to May, during the dry season. Trade winds from the east keep conditions pleasant, but the sea breeze can strengthen in the afternoon. You do not need a licence to rent a small motorboat in Belize, but operators confirm their own requirements. Larger vessels with a captain require no licence from you. A local tip: start early to avoid afternoon wind chop and to see marine life at its most active. You can also see more on the BoatHire24 marketplace.

Hire a local guide for your first reef crossing; the channels through the coral are marked but shifting sandbars can be tricky without local knowledge.

Where to find day charters in Belize Ambergris

Open the BoatHire24 website to browse verified operators offering both bareboat and skippered options. You can compare prices and availability for day charters in Belize Ambergris directly through the platform.

At a glance

  • Price range: €80 (shared) to €1,200 (crewed yacht) per day.
  • Peak season: November to May, especially December to April.
  • Trip length: from 3-hour snorkel trips to full-day (8-hour) charters.
  • Guest capacity: 4 to 12 guests depending on vessel.
  • Currency: EUR (Euro), all prices quoted here for convenience.

Questions about boat rental in Belize Ambergris

Do I need a boating licence to rent a boat in Belize Ambergris?

You do not need a licence for small motorboats under a certain size, but each operator sets its own policy and may require a short test or briefing.

Can I rent a boat for a day trip to the Great Blue Hole?

Yes, but the Blue Hole is about 50 nautical miles from San Pedro, so you need a full-day charter with a fast vessel; many operators offer this trip only from November to May.

What is the best way to book a budget boat rental?

Book a shared tour through BoatHire24 for the lowest cost per person, or join a small group to split the price of a private charter.

Whether you want a budget day on the water or a luxury escape, the BoatHire24 marketplace makes it easy to compare and book.
